column1: Xavier Edwards headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, setting the tone from the leadoff spot with a steady bat and a strong 71.5% hit probability. He’s got the platoon edge against Zack Littell and gets a boost from a hitter-friendly park, making him a prime candidate to keep your streak alive. Trea Turner isn’t far behind, also leading off and flashing a reliable profile with a favorable matchup against Martin Perez and a top-of-order role that always plays well for hit chances. Jeremy Pena and Jackson Chourio round out the list, each offering consistency at the top of their respective lineups—perfect for those looking to ride hot hands in solid spots.
